mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT s.* FROM t_agent_session s
LEFT JOIN public.t_agent_config c ON s.agent_type = c.agent_type AND c.deleted = 0
s.deleted = 0 AND s.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(s.extras->>'internalSession', 'false') != 'true'
AND s.scope_context->>'scriptId' = #{scriptId}
AND c.standalone_enabled = true AND (c.is_coordinator = false OR c.is_coordinator IS NULL)
AND (c.is_coordinator = true OR c.standalone_enabled = false OR c.standalone_enabled IS NULL)
ORDER BY s.last_active_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT s.id) FROM t_agent_session s
LEFT JOIN public.t_agent_config c ON s.agent_type = c.agent_type AND c.deleted = 0
s.deleted = 0 AND s.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(s.extras->>'internalSession', 'false') != 'true'
AND s.scope_context->>'scriptId' = #{scriptId}
AND c.standalone_enabled = true AND (c.is_coordinator = false OR c.is_coordinator IS NULL)
AND (c.is_coordinator = true OR c.standalone_enabled = false OR c.standalone_enabled IS NULL)
